stories.title: Ukraine's fast-growing defense tech sector takes center stage in Iran war
stories.description: While Ukraine seeks to shift its image from not only a recipient of military aid but also a provider, its battle-tested, anti-drone tech is taking center stage in the Iran war.

stories.title: U.K police investigating if attacks in London are the work of Iranian proxies
stories.description: U.K. police said Sunday they are investigating whether a string of arson attacks on Jewish sites in London are the work of Iranian proxies, the latest of which caused minor damage on Saturday night.

stories.title: U.S. says it seized an Iranian cargo ship, ceasefire expires soon
stories.description: The two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran is set to expire Wednesday. And the two sides seem far from a resolution. President Trump says the US has taken custody of an Iranian vessel.

stories.title: U.S. seizes Iranian cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: The U.S. has taken custody of an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz after firing on its engine room, President Trump said in a post on social media.

stories.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
stories.description: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.

stories.title: French peacekeeper killed in southern Lebanon
stories.description: President Macron blames the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denies "any connection" to the incident.

stories.title: A moment of risk and opportunity: How two ceasefires could boost US-Iran talks
stories.description: Some kind of diplomatic progress is now under way, but is it enough to prevent a return to war?

stories.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
stories.description: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

stories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

stories.title: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
stories.description: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.

stories.title: UK and France to lead defensive mission in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Sir Keir Starmer has said further details of the plan will come after a meeting in London next week.

stories.title: Israeli triple-tap strike kills three paramedics in Lebanon, officials say
stories.description: Lebanon's government condemns as a "flagrant crime" the killing of the paramedics, one of whom featured in a BBC report.

stories.title: Sri Lanka repatriates 238 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack
stories.description: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those sent home.

stories.title: The Israeli town on the frontline with Hezbollah
stories.description: BBC foreign correspondent Nick Beake visits Metula, an Israeli town surrounded on three sides by Lebanon.

stories.title: Iran says 'no decision' on whether to attend next round of US talks
stories.description: Pakistan moved ahead Monday with preparations for a new round of talks between the United States and Iran days before a tenuous ceasefire is set to expire, even as renewed conflict around the Strait of Hormuz raised questions about whether the meeting would take place. FRANCE 24 ...

stories.title: US Navy seizure of Iranian ship casts doubt on fresh ceasefire talks in Pakistan
stories.description: The US Navy's forcible seizure of an Iranian-flagged cargo ships threw doubt on an announcement from President Donald Trump that U.S. negotiators will head to Pakistan on Monday for another round of talks with Iran. Trump's announcement Sunday had raised hopes of extending a frag...

stories.title: Middle East war live: No plan for a second round of negotiations with the US, says Iran's FM
stories.description: Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson said Monday that there were no plans for a second round of negotiations with the US for now, adding that it has shown it is "not serious" about pursuing the diplomatic process, committed "aggressive acts" and violated ceasefire provisions. The...

stories.title: Trump says US delegation will travel to Islamabad on Monday, Iran declines talks
stories.description: Iran is not currently planning to attend the next round of talks with the US, which has announced that it would send a team of negotiators to Pakistan on Monday, Iranian state television reported on Sunday.

stories.title: Trump sending US delegation for Iran talks in Pakistan
stories.description: US President Donald Trump said US negotiators will head to Pakistan on Monday for another round of talks with Iran, raising hopes of extending a fragile ceasefire set to expire by Wednesday even as Washington and Tehran remain in a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz. There ⁠is ​c...

stories.title: The Strokes highlight destroyed Gaza and Iran universities at Coachella
stories.description: US band The Strokes used their Coachella set to showcase the US-Israeli destruction of universities in Gaza and Iran.

stories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 52 of US-Israeli attacks?
stories.description: Islamabad talks in limbo as Iran says it will retaliate after US marines capture an Iranian ship near Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Iran says no talks with US for now, casting doubt over Pakistan efforts
stories.description: Iran has said it will not be sending negotiators to Pakistan for talks with the US, amid rising tensions.

stories.title: US military releases video of marines seizing Iranian ship
stories.description: Video from the US military show an operation by its forces to seize an Iranian-flagged ship near the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: To stay or to go? No good options for Lebanon’s displaced
stories.description: Residents of southern Lebanon face a stark choice: stay home and risk being killed, or flee and risk deepening poverty.

stories.title: Outrage after Israeli soldier desecrates statue of Jesus Christ in Lebanon
stories.description: A photo of an Israeli soldier smashing a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon has sparked widespread outrage.

stories.title: Oil prices surge amid mixed signals on US-Iran peace talks
stories.description: Brent crude rises more than 7 percent as Washington and Tehran offer conflicting accounts on ceasefire negotiations.

stories.title: Iran war live: Tehran will skip talks as tensions rise over US ship seizure
stories.description: Attack comes hours after US President Donald Trump announced he is sending his team to Islamabad for possible talks.

stories.title: Uncertainty prevails over Islamabad talks amid mixed signals from Iran
stories.description: Uncertainty prevailed on Monday over whether the United States and Iran would hold a second round of direct talks, as mixed signals emerged from Tehran amid intensifying tensions with Washington, even as Islamabad prepared to host the two sides. Iran’s foreign ministry spokespers...

stories.title: Assault on vessel overshadows preparation for round two of US-Iran dialogue
stories.description: • Both sides offer differing accounts of incident in sea of Oman• Tehran ‘rejects’ participation over ‘Washington’s excessive demands, unrealistic expectations’• American delegation expected in Islamabad this evening; advance teams already in town• Trump’s remarks sow confusion o...

stories.title: Israel reoccupies evacuated West Bank settlement
stories.description: SA NUR/MADRID: Israeli ministers on Sunday officially reopened Sa-Nur, a settlement in the occupied West Bank that was evacuated 20 years ago, marking the occasion with defiant declarations against Palestinian statehood and calls to resettle Gaza. Several cabinet members and lawm...

stories.title: Lebanon restores lifelines as Israel extends demolition
stories.description: • Beirut reopens vital Qasmiyeh bridge, road linking the south after strikes• Israel pushes deeper, mapping buffer zone inside Lebanese territory BEIRUT: Lebanon’s military announced on Sunday it had reopened a key road and bridge destroyed by Israeli strikes in the country’s sou...

stories.title: Indian officials push for regional energy hub in Sri Lanka
stories.description: Indian officials called for the swift implementation of a proposed regional energy hub in Sri Lanka at the start of bilateral talks in Colombo on Sunday. The planned oil hub in the northeastern port of Trincomalee featured in a meeting with Sri Lankan President Anura Kumara Dissa...

stories.title: UK PM to face grilling from MPs today over Mandelson scandal
stories.description: • Starmer faces fresh calls to quit after it was revealed ex-envoy to US failed vetting process in late 2024• Ministers support embattled premier, say he was unaware of clearance status at the time• Opposition leaders have called for premier to step down LONDON: Embattled UK Prim...

stories.title: Watch: Islamabad tightens security ahead of possible US-Iran talks
U.S., allied forces kick off combat drills with Philippines despite Washington's focus on Iran
stories.description: The large-scale combat drills between the U.S. and Philippines will expand this year to include other militaries, including from Japan, France and Canada, which have signed visiting forces agreements with Manila

stories.title: Iran-Israel war live: Over 3,300 people have died in Iran during war, says Iran’s Forensic Chief
stories.description: Iran accuses U.S. of ceasefire breach, vows to 'soon respond' after U.S. destroyer hits cargo ship

stories.title: Over 3,300 people have died in Iran during war: Iran’s Forensic Chief
stories.description: His comments did not break down casualties among civilians and security forces; instead, he just said that 2,875 were male and 496 were female. Mr. Masjedi said 383 of the dead were children 18 years old and under

stories.title: Los Angeles woman arrested on Iranian arms trafficking charge
stories.description: Shamim Mafi will face charges that she brokered the sale of “drones, bombs, bomb fuses, and millions of rounds of ammunition” between Iran and the Sudanese Armed Forces, First U.S. Attorney Bill Essayli said

stories.title: Iran executes two men accused of involvement in ‘spy network linked to Israel’, judiciary news outlet reports
stories.description: The two, identified as Mohammad Masoum ​Shahi and Hamed ‌Validi, were accused of belonging to a ‌spy network linked to ​Mossad and had received ⁠training abroad, including in Iraq’s Kurdistan ‌region
